creator: dpetrov67@gmail.com
text:
I know this is an old bug report, but other people might find this useful:

The issue is likely caused by obsolete library in /lib that was never removed

Try this:
  rm -f /lib/libreadline.*

It helped me to finally fix the problem with python (various versions) and some other ports.

If you are upgrading FreeBSD from sources, do not forget about "make delete-old-libs" (do not just run it, you have to recompile ports to use most recent libraries, etc.).
